name: OpenMM MD
description: Simulate energy minimization of a protein in water. Run molecular simulation with AMBER forcefield and conduct trajectory analysis including RMSD, RMSF, Rg, and PCA.
capabilities: Simulate energy minimization of a protein in water
Run molecular simulation with AMBER forcefield and conduct trajectory analysis including RMSD, RMSF, Rg, and PCA

pdb_file.description: Protein structure in PDB format for molecular dynamics simulation

ligand_file.description: Ligand structure in SDF format for protein-ligand simulation

forcefield.description: AMBER force field for the simulation
